data.content: Shipment review approved. Commit a41cfd477eeb live on main/origin. Quality gates clean on committed code: tsc clean, 135 test files / 2003 tests pass. New beats-view.ts module correctly adds search as first-class view. SearchBar navigates to view=search&q=... on Enter, clears gracefully. Shared parsing deduplicated across page.tsx and app-header.tsx. 5 new unit tests cover all key behaviors. No invariants, no regressions.
